== Notes for [[Item:Q82624|Q82624]] ==

Domitia Lucilla Major n.Lacium, romana cc. Paulus Calvisius Tulio Ruso el 76 DC.

the name that came up in an Aristobulus IV geneology was Pompeia Plotina Domitia Lucillia mother of Doitia Lucilla Trajanus mother of Marcus Aurelius, Emperor of the Roman Empire and father of Crispus Commodus, Emperor of Rome.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F294091E3E71EFBBE49822EF79916C6F01
geni:6000000008211626950

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
